games.title: Portal 2
games.description: Team up to solve mind-bending puzzles using the portal gun in Valve's legendary co-op campaign. Features a full separate co-op story with unique test chambers designed for two players.

games.title: It Takes Two
games.description: A genre-bending co-op adventure where a couple turned into dolls must work together through imaginative levels. Every stage introduces completely new gameplay mechanics.

games.title: Left 4 Dead 2
games.description: Survive the zombie apocalypse with up to 4 friends. Fight through campaigns filled with hordes of infected, special zombies, and intense finale events.

games.title: Borderlands 3
games.description: Looter-shooter mayhem with billions of guns. Team up with friends to blast through chaotic worlds, collect insane loot, and take down bosses in this co-op FPS.

games.title: A Way Out
games.description: A cinematic co-op prison break experience. Two players must cooperate to escape prison and survive on the run in this story-driven split-screen adventure.

games.title: Deep Rock Galactic
games.description: Space dwarves mining in dangerous caves. Dig, explore, and fight alien bugs with your team in fully destructible procedurally generated underground environments.

games.title: Helldivers 2
games.description: Spread democracy across the galaxy in this intense co-op shooter. Call in airstrikes, set up turrets, and fight massive alien bugs and robots with your squad.

games.title: Overcooked! 2
games.description: Chaotic co-op cooking at its finest. Work together in increasingly absurd kitchens to prepare and serve meals before time runs out. Friendships will be tested.

games.title: Phasmophobia
games.description: Hunt ghosts with your friends using real ghost hunting equipment. Identify the type of ghost haunting each location before it hunts you down in the dark.

games.title: Stardew Valley
games.description: Build your dream farm with friends. Grow crops, raise animals, explore mines, and become part of the community in this relaxing co-op farming RPG.

games.title: Terraria
games.description: Dig, fight, explore, build. A 2D sandbox adventure where you and your friends can shape the world, craft powerful gear, and defeat massive bosses together.

games.title: Lethal Company
games.description: Scavenge abandoned moons for valuable loot to meet your employer's profit quota. Watch out for the terrifying creatures lurking in every dark corner.

games.title: Raft
games.description: Survive on a tiny raft in the middle of the ocean. Gather debris, expand your raft, dive for resources, and explore islands with your friends.

games.title: Don't Starve Together
games.description: Survive in a strange wilderness with your friends. Gather resources, craft tools, build shelter, and try not to go insane in this dark survival game.

games.title: Halo: The Master Chief Collection
games.description: Six legendary Halo games in one collection. Play through iconic campaigns in co-op or battle it out in multiplayer across every classic Halo arena.

games.title: Valheim
games.description: A Viking survival game where you explore a vast procedural world, build mighty halls, and fight fearsome mythological creatures with your clan.

games.title: Dying Light
games.description: Parkour through a zombie-infested open world with friends. By day scavenge supplies and craft weapons. By night survive the terrifying volatile infected.

games.title: Divinity: Original Sin 2
games.description: One of the greatest RPGs ever made, fully playable in co-op. Create your character, make choices that matter, and experience a rich fantasy story with friends.

games.title: Dead Rising 2
games.description: Zombie slaying sandbox where you craft insane combo weapons and fight through hordes of undead. Originally single-player, now playable in co-op via Nucleus Co-op.
games.modNotes: Use Nucleus Co-op with Goldberg emulator for split-screen local co-op. Requires some initial setup but works well.

games.title: Dark Souls III
games.description: Challenge the toughest bosses in gaming with a friend by your side. Seamless co-op lets you summon allies to help you survive the punishing world of Lothric.
games.modNotes: The Seamless Co-op mod removes all co-op restrictions — play through the entire game together without being sent home after bosses.

games.title: Resident Evil 5
games.description: Fight bio-organic weapons in Africa with a partner. The entire campaign is designed for two-player co-op with intense action and horror moments.

games.title: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim
games.description: Explore the vast world of Skyrim with friends using the Skyrim Together Reborn mod. Quest, fight dragons, and adventure across Tamriel in multiplayer.
games.modNotes: Skyrim Together Reborn adds multiplayer to Skyrim SE. Requires all players to have the mod installed and connect to a server.

games.title: Elden Ring
games.description: Explore the Lands Between with friends using the Seamless Co-op mod. Fight massive bosses, discover hidden areas, and experience the full open world together.
games.modNotes: LukeYui's Seamless Co-op mod allows full open-world co-op without the summoning restrictions of vanilla multiplayer.
